description: Harvey provides AI software for legal and professional services, including legal question answering, document analysis, vault-based knowledge workflows, and workspace activity exports. Its platform is used by organizations to apply AI to legal documents, research, and internal workflows.
summary: Harvey exposes a bearer-token HTTP API at `api.harvey.ai` for assistant, vault, history export, audit log, and client-matter operations, plus a hosted MCP server at `https://api.harvey.ai/hosted_mcp/mcp` over streamable HTTP using OAuth.
